display.purpose: Rare page or route statements; compact and high authority.

headline.purpose: Node names, major shell labels, and high-value operational titles.

panel-title.purpose: Panel headers, drawers, settings groups, and compact feature headers.

body.purpose: Default prose and row descriptions in dense UI.

caption.purpose: Helper text, compact descriptions, and secondary context.

label.purpose: Uppercase operational labels, table headers, and state headings.

machine.purpose: IDs, endpoints, model names, capacities, timings, ports, percentages, and generated configuration.

shadows.name: surface-low
shadows.purpose: Subtle stacked panel depth only when separated from the shell.

shadows.name: surface-popover
shadows.purpose: Hover cards, menus, and small floating panels.

shadows.name: surface-modal
shadows.purpose: Command palette and blocking modal surfaces.

shadows.name: surface-drawer
shadows.purpose: Side drawers and large non-modal overlays.

shadows.name: focus-accent
shadows.purpose: Focus glow paired with the required 2px accent outline.

shadows.name: surface-hover
shadows.purpose: Temporary hover feedback for actionable surfaces.

motion.name: control-state
motion.purpose: Background, border, color, opacity, and shadow state changes.

motion.name: control-press
motion.purpose: Small translate feedback for pressed controls.

motion.name: mesh-live-pulse
motion.purpose: Live mesh signal only; disabled under reduced motion.

motion.name: chat-generating-dot
motion.purpose: Generation progress only; disabled under reduced motion.

breakpoints.name: mobile
breakpoints.purpose: Adjust shell, navigation, and preferences sizing.

breakpoints.name: narrow-mobile
breakpoints.purpose: Further compress shell and utility controls.

components.name: Base Control
components.description: Default compact action surface with panel background, hairline border, dim text, hover accent mix, active translate, disabled opacity, and visible focus outline.

components.name: Primary Control
components.description: Accent-filled decisive action or active navigation state using accent ink.

components.name: StatusBadge
components.description: Tone-aware pill with text label and optional dot; backgrounds use 18% state color mix and borders use 30%.
components.css: inline color-mix styles driven by tone tokens

components.name: SegmentedControl
components.description: Radix RadioGroup-backed pill or button variants with selected-tone support and accent focus treatment.

components.name: Panel Shell
components.description: Flat bordered 10px-radius panel used for chat, settings, catalogs, banners, and operational sections.

components.name: InfoBanner
components.description: Functional accent-to-panel banner with optional icon frame, status, and action; not a decorative gradient component.

components.name: NativeSelect
components.description: 32px high compact select with 240px minimum width, ui-control treatment, monospace value, and explicit focus outline.

components.name: Slider
components.description: Accessible range control with 8px track, 16px thumb, accent progress, visible value, bounds, and aria-valuetext.

components.name: TopNav
components.description: Sticky surface-chrome app bar with compact brand cluster, primary tabs, API status chip, theme, preferences, and utility controls.

components.name: Mesh Canvas
components.description: Faint 22px grid, sparse route glow, packets, live pulses, radar pings, and reduced-motion safeguards for the network visualization.

narrative.overview: A compact operations console for governing distributed local AI inference. It makes peers, endpoints, capacities, routes, warnings, and live packets visible and controllable without consumer-chat softness or SaaS-dashboard vagueness.

rules.name: The One Live Signal Rule
rules.body: Accent color marks current action, focus, route, or live state. Do not spend it on decoration.

rules.name: The Three Surface Rule
rules.body: Ordinary depth uses only background, panel, and inset panel. Simplify before adding another surface.

rules.name: The Machine Values Rule
rules.body: Model names, endpoints, IDs, memory values, routes, timestamps, generated config, and telemetry use mono with tabular numbers.

rules.name: The Flat Until Floating Rule
rules.body: Panels, rows, cards, and tables do not receive elevation at rest. Shadows mean floating, selected, live, dragged, focused, or responding to input.

dos: Use semantic tokens from src/styles/globals.css as the source of truth.
Keep light and dark themes equally intentional.
Use mono type for machine values and telemetry.
Pair state color with text, dots, or icons.
Respect reduced motion and use motion only for state, routing, or feedback.
donts: Do not make the product feel like generic SaaS.
Do not use gaming-neon cyberpunk, holographic sci-fi, or loud AI magic styling.
Do not use consumer-chat bubbles, giant composers, or assistant personality.
Do not use decorative gradients, glassmorphism, multicolor dashboards, or gradient text.
Do not invent local colors, type sizes, timings, or shadows when global tokens already provide the contract.
